args.body:
Dear Mr. Lee,

Thank you for submitting your referral for Emma. We received the fax from Northside Pediatrics and are pleased to help.

We have reviewed Emma's information and availability, and we have several appointment openings that may work for your family. A team member will reach out to you shortly to discuss scheduling options that fit your preferred Tuesday or Thursday after-school times, as well as to answer any questions you may have about our services and your insurance coverage.

We look forward to working with Emma and your family.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Contact Daniel Lee at 555-0101 or daniel.lee@example.com to confirm appointment availability, finalize scheduling, and verify insurance details before the pending_review hold expires on 2026-05-23.

The reply acknowledges receipt, confirms alignment with the family's schedule preferences, and prompts staff to proceed with scheduling the earliest available appointment (Maya Chen, 2026-04-29) while the hold is active.

args.reason: Safeguarding disclosure — potential harm to child; mandated-reporter escalation required

args.notes: Safeguarding disclosure received. Source: Maria Gomez voicemail. Body: Transcript: Hi, this is Maria Gomez calling about my son Leo, he is 6. I wanted to ask about speech therapy openings. He has been more clingy since his dad started getting rough with him during weekends, anyway can we get him in for an eval next Tuesday? Please call me at 555-0102.
args.title: SAFEGUARDING review: Leo — same-hour required

args.body: Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy. A team member will follow up with you shortly.

items.recommended_next_action: Do not send this reply yet. Escalate immediately to the clinical lead for safeguarding review and mandated-reporter assessment before any outbound communication.
items.draft_reply: Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy. A team member will follow up with you shortly.

escalation.reason: Safeguarding disclosure — potential harm to child; mandated-reporter escalation required

items.decision_rationale: This is a P0 safeguarding disclosure involving potential harm to a child. Per policy, only a neutral acknowledgement is appropriate for the draft pending clinical lead review and human assessment of reporting obligations.

args.notes: Payer is not in network for Cedar Kids Therapy; benefits conversation required.
args.title: Insurance issue: Owen Brooks — out_of_network

args.body:
Dear Rachel,

Thank you so much for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy, and thank you to Dr. Yu at Westside Pediatrics for the referral. We're glad to learn more about Owen and how we can support your family.

Before we move forward with scheduling an OT evaluation, we need to have a brief conversation with you about insurance benefits. Our records show that Kaiser HMO is out-of-network for our practice, so we want to make sure you have a clear understanding of any out-of-pocket costs and coverage before we hold an appointment slot. Our billing team will reach out to you to discuss this and answer any questions you may have.

Once we've connected on benefits, we'll be happy to work with your preference for morning appointments and get Owen scheduled as soon as possible.

Thank you again for choosing Cedar Kids Therapy. We look forward to speaking with you soon.

Best regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Ensure the billing team initiates the benefits conversation with Rachel Brooks (555-0103 or rachel.brooks@example.com) to clarify Kaiser HMO coverage and out-of-pocket responsibility before any appointment is scheduled.

The reply acknowledges the referral warmly, explains the next step transparently, and sets expectations while the billing task that was already created handles the insurance discussion.

args.body:
Dear Carla,

Thank you so much for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy. We received the referral from your pediatrician for Mateo, and we appreciate you providing his insurance information and contact details.

We've reviewed your request and are pleased to let you know that we have availability to evaluate Mateo with our physical therapy team. We'll be working on scheduling and will follow up with you shortly to confirm an appointment time that works best for your family.

In the meantime, if you have any questions or need to reach us, please don't hesitate to contact our office at your convenience.

We look forward to working with Mateo and your family.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Contact Carla at 555-0104 to confirm the available PT appointment with Priya Shah on 2026-04-29 at 1:00 PM, verify insurance and copay, and finalize scheduling.

args.body:
Hi Jordan,

Thank you for reaching out about Ava! Speech and language development can vary from child to child, and questions about sound production are great ones to explore with a professional.

Rather than offer guidance over message, we'd love to have one of our speech-language pathologists chat with you about your observations and concerns. They can discuss what's typical for Ava's age and help you figure out the best next step—whether that's watchful waiting, an informal screening, or a full evaluation.

Would you be interested in scheduling a quick phone consultation with one of our clinicians? That way you can get personalized insight before deciding if a formal evaluation makes sense for your family.

Please let us know if you have any other questions!

Best,
Cedar Kids Therapy Team

items.recommended_next_action: Route to clinical staff (speech-language pathology) for initial phone consultation or screening discussion with parent to address developmental question.

items.decision_rationale: This is a clinical developmental question that requires professional assessment rather than automated advice. A clinician can safely discuss typical development and help the family make an informed decision about next steps without providing diagnosis or treatment recommendations.

args.notes: Missing fields: DOB or age, parent/guardian contact information, insurance/payer information, member ID. Contact referring provider: Lakeview Pediatrics fax.
args.title: Incomplete referral: Sam Taylor — missing info required

args.body:
Dear Dr. Keene,

Thank you for referring Sam Taylor to Cedar Kids Therapy for speech-language pathology evaluation. We appreciate you reaching out.

To move forward with the referral, we need to collect some additional information:

• Child's date of birth
• Parent/guardian name and contact information
• Insurance carrier and member ID

Once we receive these details, our intake team will be in touch with the family to schedule an evaluation.

Please reply to this email with the missing information, or feel free to contact us directly if you have any questions.

Best regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Route this reply to intake for follow-up once the missing information is received from the referring provider.

A professional request for these details maintains the relationship with the referring provider while enabling proper intake processing without making assumptions about the family or clinical status.

args.body:
Hola Ana,

Gracias por llamar y contactarnos sobre Isabella. Estamos muy contentos de poder ayudarte.

Recibimos tu referencia para una evaluación de habla para tu hija. Hemos verificado que tienes cobertura activa de Medicaid y sin copagos. Tambien tomamos nota de tu preferencia por atención en español, y tenemos una patóloga del habla que habla español disponible.

Un miembro de nuestro equipo se pondrá en contacto contigo pronto para programar la cita. Si tienes preguntas mientras tanto, no dudes en llamar.

Saludos cordiales,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Contact Ana Lopez at 555-0107 to confirm the appointment with Lucia Morales, MA CCC-SLP on April 30, 2026 at 11:00 AM, and collect any additional intake information needed.

args.reason: Same-day cancellation — prompt staff action required to manage slot and contact family

args.notes: Contact family to reschedule. URGENT!!! Noah Patel threw up at school and I can't make today's 3pm OT appointment. Noah's DOB is 2017-11-02. Please reschedule!!! You can call or email me, 555-0108.
args.title: Same-day cancellation: Noah Patel

args.body:
Dear Anita,

Thank you for letting us know right away about today's cancellation. We received your message and understand that Noah is not feeling well.

A member of our front desk team will contact you shortly at 555-0108 to discuss rescheduling options and find a time that works for your family.

We appreciate you reaching out promptly.

Best regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Front desk staff should contact Anita Patel at 555-0108 to confirm the cancellation, review available makeup slots with the OT provider, and offer rescheduling options.

escalation.reason: Same-day cancellation — prompt staff action required to manage slot and contact family

items.decision_rationale: This is a same-day illness cancellation requiring immediate administrative handling. The reply acknowledges the urgent notification without clinical comment, confirms next steps are in progress, and sets clear expectations for staff follow-up.
